data_room.description: Executive view for AML case management - cases, customers, SAR filings, and audit logs. Migrated from e2-demo-west.
data_room.suggestion_description:
This space provides an executive overview of AML (Anti-Money Laundering) case management, enabling analysis across cases, customers, SAR filings, and audit logs.

**Capabilities:**
- Track case volumes, statuses, types, and investigation times across teams, analysts, and alert scenarios
- Analyze customer risk profiles, PEP (politically exposed person) status, and KYC statuses linked to cases
- Measure SAR (Suspicious Activity Report) filing rates, amounts, and related activity details
- Audit case management actions and workflow history for compliance review
- Calculate key operational metrics such as false positive rate, average investigation time, and case closure trends

**Limitations:**
- Does not include transaction-level details or specific alert-generation logic
- Cannot assess effectiveness of specific AML rules or scenario models beyond case outcomes
- No integration with external data sources or real-time monitoring analytics

description: Executive view for AML case management - cases, customers, SAR filings, and audit logs. Migrated from e2-demo-west.
name: agent-aml-case360-executive-view
